fields.title: Urban Solar Corridor Installation
fields.description: Installation of photovoltaic canopies along the A64 arterial route. This project includes battery storage units to power local street lighting and feed excess energy back into the community grid.
fields.sustainability_goal: Generates 1.2 GWh of clean energy annually, offsetting 300 tonnes of CO2. Reduces grid dependency for street lighting by 100%.

fields.title: Living Roof Retrofit - Civic Hall
fields.description: Retrofitting the Grade II listed Civic Hall with a sedum and wildflower green roof to improve thermal insulation and reduce stormwater runoff.
fields.sustainability_goal: Increases local pollinator biodiversity by 25% and reduces building heating costs by 15% through passive insulation.

fields.title: Mycelium Insulation Pilot Scheme
fields.description: A pilot project to insulate 50 social housing units using bio-composite mycelium panels instead of synthetic foam.
fields.sustainability_goal: Replaces petrochemical insulation with 100% biodegradable materials. Sequesters 50 tonnes of carbon in the building fabric.

fields.title: River Aire Rewilding & Flood Defence
fields.description: Natural flood management strategy using beaver dam analogues and riparian tree planting to slow water flow and enhance river ecosystems.
fields.sustainability_goal: Restores 5km of riverbank habitat and reduces downstream flood risk for 500 homes without using concrete.

fields.title: Zero-Emission Tramway Extension
fields.description: Extension of the light rail network to connect suburban areas, utilizing recycled steel rails and solar-powered signalling.
fields.sustainability_goal: Removes an estimated 5,000 daily car journeys from the city centre, improving air quality index (AQI) by 10 points.

fields.title: Community Vertical Farm Hub
fields.description: Conversion of a disused multi-storey car park into a hydroponic vertical farm powered by renewable energy.
fields.sustainability_goal: Produces 50 tonnes of local food annually with 95% less water than traditional farming. Reduces food mile emissions to near zero.

fields.title: Passivhaus Social Housing Development
fields.description: Construction of 120 affordable homes meeting Passivhaus standards, utilizing timber frames and air-source heat pumps.
fields.sustainability_goal: Delivers net-zero operational carbon homes. Reduces tenant energy bills by an average of £800/year.

fields.title: City Centre Cycle Superhighway
fields.description: Creation of segregated cycle lanes using recycled plastic aggregate for surfacing. Includes secure bike storage hubs.
fields.sustainability_goal: Promotes active travel, aiming for a 20% increase in cycle commuting. Utilizes 50 tonnes of recycled plastic waste in construction.

fields.title: District Heating Network Expansion
fields.description: Expanding the underground heat network to utilize waste heat from the local data centre to warm public buildings.
fields.sustainability_goal: Recycles 40 GWh of waste heat annually. Reduces gas consumption in civic buildings by 80%.

fields.title: Wetland Restoration - Brownfield Site
fields.description: Remediation of a contaminated industrial site into a public wetland park using phytoremediation plants to clean the soil.
fields.sustainability_goal: Decontaminates 10 hectares of land using biological processes. Creates a new habitat for wetland birds and amphibians.

fields.title: Smart LED Street Lighting Upgrade
fields.description: Replacing all remaining sodium street lamps with smart LEDs that dim based on foot traffic sensors.
fields.sustainability_goal: Reduces municipal electricity consumption for lighting by 60%. Minimizes light pollution impacting nocturnal wildlife.

fields.title: Electric Bus Fleet Charging Depot
fields.description: Construction of a rapid-charging depot for the new electric bus fleet, featuring a solar roof and rainwater harvesting for bus washing.
fields.sustainability_goal: Supports the transition to a 100% electric bus fleet. Saves 4 million litres of water annually via harvesting systems.

fields.title: Heritage Building Window Retrofit
fields.description: Installing vacuum-insulated glazing in historic town hall windows to improve efficiency without altering the visual facade.
fields.sustainability_goal: Reduces thermal loss by 70% in a heritage asset, demonstrating that historic preservation and net zero are compatible.

fields.title: Urban Micro-Forests (Tiny Forests)
fields.description: Planting 20 dense 'Miyawaki' style micro-forests on small plots of underutilized urban land.
fields.sustainability_goal: Absorbs carbon 30x faster than traditional planting. Creates immediate urban cooling islands and biodiversity hotspots.

fields.title: School Retrofit & Decarbonisation
fields.description: Comprehensive energy retrofit of 5 local primary schools, including heat pumps, solar PV, and fabric-first insulation upgrades.
fields.sustainability_goal: Creates healthy, warm learning environments while reducing the council's education estate carbon footprint by 85%.

fields.title: Clyde Waterfront Regeneration Strategy
fields.description: A strategic framework project to revitalize the industrial waterfront. Currently in the early planning phase, determining scope for future mixed-use eco-developments.
fields.sustainability_goal: Aims to reconnect the city with the river, prioritizing blue-green infrastructure and flood resilience for future generations.
